title: XBR Snapshot
description: This pack adds VanillaXBR styled textures for the creaking, creaking heart and the pale garden which have been added in the 1.22 snapshot
body: This pack adds [VanillaXBR](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/vanillaxbr) styled textures for the creaking, creaking heart and the pale garden which have been added in the 1.21.2 snapshot
